personal.name: Clifford Atsika
personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
personal.tagline: Building Production-Ready Software That Solves Real Problems

hero.lede: Full-Stack Engineer and SaaS Founder building production-ready software. Creator of Keymint.dev, specializing in secure systems and developer tools.

about.title: About
about.intro: Full-Stack Engineer and SaaS Founder building production-ready solutions that solve real problems.
paragraphs: With over five years of experience, I've designed and launched Keymint.dev—a secure licensing infrastructure for developers. My work empowers developers to manage licensing through a robust API and intuitive dashboard.

As a freelance developer, I've delivered 15+ custom web apps and automation tools globally. I specialize in robust backend systems, secure payments, and high-performance interfaces, focusing on clean code and scalability.
about.quote: Building software isn't just about writing code—it's about understanding problems deeply and crafting solutions that stand the test of time.

skills.title: Frontend Development
skills.description: Building fast, accessible interfaces with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Expert in Tailwind CSS and modern UI patterns.

skills.title: Backend Development
skills.description: Designing scalable APIs with Node.js and Python. Proficient in PostgreSQL, Supabase, and Firebase, with a focus on auth and cloud deployments.

skills.title: Security & Cryptography
skills.description: Implementing secure auth and offline licensing using Ed25519, JWT, and best practices. Experienced in building robust licensing flows.

skills.title: SaaS & Developer Tools
skills.description: Building end-to-end SaaS platforms: architecture, UX, Stripe payments, and analytics. Creator of Keymint.dev.

skills.title: Desktop Applications
skills.description: Developing cross-platform desktop tools with PyQt and Python, automating workflows to boost productivity.

skills.title: Databases & Infrastructure
skills.description: Proficient with PostgreSQL, Redis, and cloud infrastructure. Skilled in database design and distributed systems.

skills.title: Payments & Integrations
skills.description: Integrating reliable payment systems like Stripe. Experienced with webhooks, subscriptions, and billing logic.

skills.title: SEO & Analytics
skills.description: Optimizing visibility via technical SEO and semantic HTML. Driving iteration with PostHog and Search Console analytics.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.intro: Open to new projects and collaborations. Whether you have a product idea or need technical consulting, I'd love to hear from you.

resume.objective: Full-Stack Engineer with 5+ years experience shipping scalable SaaS platforms. Expert in translating business needs into production software.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
achievements: Delivered 15+ custom web applications and automation tools to clients in over 5 countries.
Improved client productivity by up to 30% by developing 5+ custom PyQt desktop applications.
Engineered and integrated secure Stripe billing systems for 8+ platforms.
Successfully managed over 20 projects across global time zones, maintaining 100% client satisfaction.
Boosted client organic traffic by an average of 40% through targeted SEO optimizations.

experience.title: Founder & Software Engineer
achievements: Architected a robust licensing backend with a REST API, enabling developers to integrate secure licensing into their applications in minutes.
Developed a vendor dashboard with real-time analytics, providing valuable insights into license activation and usage patterns.
Implemented multiple licensing models (perpetual, subscription, trial) to provide flexible options for software developers.
Designed a self-service customer portal, reducing support overhead and empowering end-users to manage their own licenses.
Ensured high security and reliability, building trust with a growing base of developers.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

achievements: Published open-source GitHub Email Scraper used by 200+ developers
Reduced data collection time by 80% for research teams
